title: Dulux Silk Emulsion Paint For Walls And Ceilings - Natural Slate 2.5 Litres
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
description: From the manufacturer Be Inspired Overtly Olive is a muted olive green, which captures the warm leafy tones of nature. Choose this shade if you have a light space and would like to create a restful room where you can unwind and relax. Goose Down is a timeless, mid-tone grey that adds a touch of class to your room. Choose this shade if you’re looking for a feathery, cool neutral that harmonises beautifully with a diverse range of colours and adds elegance to your home. Pebble Shore is a sandy, mid neutral with a touch of khaki. It has an atmospheric, coastal effect. Choose this shade if you’re looking for a flexible colour that suits any period of home and brings a feeling of relaxation to your space. Almond White is a natural cream with a warm neutral effect. This is a softer shade with hints of grey, so it has a lovely muted quality. Choose this shade if you’d like to complement wood and create a light, contemporary feeling in your space.
